magicFill.prompt: Extract the Serial number, keep only the number as answer. If there is an error, do not output anything
Extract the Serial number, keep only the number as answer. If there is an error, do not output anything

elements.label: Machine is free of visible damage (scratches/dents)
Tire pressure is within manufacturer specifications
Machine is free of fluid leaks (oil, coolant, fuel)
All Fluid Levels (Oil, Coolant, Hydraulic) are at proper operating levels
Engine starts and runs smoothly without warning lights
Machine's safety switches are properly adjusted and operating as designed
Steering and Transmission are functioning correctly
Engine oil pressure indicator operates properly
